title: EventClient
description: A highly customizable client designed for events!
body:
This client is mainly used for playing minecraft events! an example of this is when the popular youtuber **Skeppy** hosts an event!
# Why use Event Client instead of my current client?
You should use Event Client because of the fact that you can add **ANY** mods you want, it's **fast** boot up time and it's user friendly UI.
# How would I add my own mods?
Using modrinth's **add content** feature, it allows you to add any mod you want. Whether it be a _health indicator_ mod or a _mini map_ mod, you can add it!
# How do I edit my mods?
To customize your mods you can either check the Mod Menu in the main menu or through the pause menu, or for some mods, it will have a custom keybind which you can find and edit in the keybinds section.
### Other Questions
For any other questions that need answering you can either join the  or try look on google or youtube.
### Can you update the version to [Version]?
Versions will be released as soon as possible but it relies on other mod makers to update their versions.
